name: source-folder closed-loop step audit-pack reports per-source-folder coverage for the active rule set
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google compliance && : > compliance/audit.log && printf 'source:
  id: google-new
rules:
  - id: g-google-new-1
    detector: x
' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/google-new.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step audit-pack-coverage --root generated-code-quality-standards --audit-log compliance/audit.log --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'section: Per-source-folder coverage' out.txt && grep -q 'namespace=google rules=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
